title: calceolaria uniflora
intro: Calceolaria uniflora, also known as the single-flowered slipper flower, is a type of flowering plant native to the Andes in South America. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria uniflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria uniflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
